title: Multimedia Programmer and Integrator at Grupo Z (Somni Systems)
description: Production of interactive CD-ROMs for Enciclopèdia Catalana, the Great Encyclopedia of Rock for Man magazine, and product demos for Zeta Multimedia.
body:
At **Somni Systems**, a company of the **Zeta Group**, I worked as a programmer and multimedia integrator at a time when the CD-ROM was the reference format for distributing interactive content.

## Reference Projects

-   **Interactive Summer Notebooks for Enciclopèdia Catalana** — Interactive educational tools for schoolchildren, with navigation, exercises, and fun elements.
-   **Great Encyclopedia of Rock for Man magazine** — A cultural CD-ROM about the history of rock, with audio, video, and interactive artist profiles.
-   **Product Demos for Zeta Multimedia** — Interactive presentation materials for the multimedia division of the publishing group.

## The CD-ROM as a Platform

Working with CD-ROMs involved managing the memory limitations and read speed of the time's hardware, optimizing assets and **Lingo** code to ensure a smooth experience across various hardware configurations.

## Technologies

-   Macromedia Director
-   Lingo
-   Photoshop
-   Freehand
